## Everything you need to Succeed in HR

From on-demand training to downloadable templates & career planning, your membership provides the support you need to make your next career move.

### All Certificate Programs and Courses

#### Artificial Intelligence for HR

Master AI tools to boost your productivity and unlock strategic HR value

#### People Analytics

Develop a full analytics skill-set for excellent, data-driven HR

#### HR Generalist

Learn how to set up, run, and expand an HR department

#### HR Business Partner 2.0

Become a truly strategic and impactful partner to the business

#### Compensation and Benefits

Gain the skills to create a future-proof Comp & Ben strategy

* \+ 10 more Certificate Programs
* & 56 courses & mini-courses

Download Brochure

### Interactive HR Career Planner

How do you get from your current role to your dream job?

With the Career Map tool you can map out your career journey, set clear goals, and see which skills you need to build to take your next step.

### Practical templates & resources

Never start from scratch. Hit the ground running with hundreds of off-the-shelf templates, playbooks, and tools to use in your job.

See the HR Resource Library for yourself

### Recertification credits

AIHR is a recertification provider with the world’s leading HR associations. Earn your AIHR certification while earning recertification credits through courses and live events.

### Learning coaching & career guidance

Stay on track with your development goals. Your AIHR coach will be available to provide support and accountability.

### Join a worldwide HR community

Expand your horizon with new perspectives, thought-provoking discussions, and best practices from peers & experts.

### Mini courses

Stay ahead with the latest HR trends, sharpen your skills in High-Impact Performance Management, or master AI prompt engineering, all through short, practical, and actionable mini courses.

### Benchmark & track progress

Get insight into your strengths and see how your skills compare to your peers’ with powerful assessments.

### Exclusive live online events

Stay up to date with the latest HR trends and innovations by joining live events available exclusively to members – and get SHRM & HRCI credits while you’re at it.

### Practical, hands-on learning

Hands-on case studies and practical assignments help you immediately apply and retain your new HR skills.

### AIHR Copilot

Get the job done faster. Instantly get trustworthy answers, expert-level advice, and practical next steps.

THE ONLY HR MEMBERSHIP YOU NEED TO SUCCEED

## Proven online learning: practical, comprehensive, game changing

### How practical are the programs?

“The courses are professional, well-built, and very concrete. I especially like the examples and case studies – they are not only useful but truly allow you to apply your learning to the real world.”

Cristiana Rossi

HR Head of Business Transformation at Ermenegildo Zegna Group

### Will it help my career?

“The course offerings by AIHR never disappoint. The information is presented very well, and has really helped to elevate my HR criteria through numerous certifications that I’ve been able to attach to my resume.”

Jason Hall

HR Director - Lancaster Rehabilitation Hospital

### What’s the portal like?

“The student portal and the app are just amazing. I have been in many online programs and AIHR is simple, neat as in not overwhelming and so inviting to come back again. These days with too much information to absorb, you just want to have something that is simple, easy to navigate, and it has what you need.”

Nijan Sharina Angi

Senior HR Associate - International Islamic Trade Finance Corporation

### How relevant are AIHR courses?

“What stands out for me is how relevant and fresh everything is. My MBA feels almost antiquated, like I’m trying to navigate rush hour traffic with a Model T. But AIHR certification courses keep you relevant and able to stay in the game. I didn’t have to wait until I completed a course to use what I learned.”

Stephen M. Jeffries

Human Resource Generalist - Precision Combustion, Inc.

### How can AIHR help me grow as a professional?

“After a class, I’ll do one of the mini courses or download materials. Recently, I’ve used the templates for exit interviews. I’ll definitely be using it more because the scope of my role will expand. Having AIHR support is going to be very helpful, from knowledge to assets.”

Xavier Smith

Global HR Business Partner - MAXIS Global Benefits Network

## FAQs

Need help making the right choice? Our team of admissions advisors are ready to help! Talk to them here or send them a message.

### Which courses are included?

The Full Access plan gives you access to all AIHR courses and certifications. You will also get automatic access to new courses and content released during your membership.

### What happens when my access period expires?

Full Access licenses renew automatically at the same billing interval after their initial 12-month duration.

Don’t worry: if you are on the annual plan, we will send renewal reminders before charging your card again.

### How does the money-back guarantee work?

We pride ourselves on the quality of our programs. That’s why we offer a 60-day, no-questions-asked, 100% money-back guarantee. If for any reason you are unhappy, just contact our support team ([\](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)) and they will issue a full refund!

### Where can I find more details on these courses?

Download the syllabus for a detailed overview of the curriculum of each course.

### How can I enroll my team?

Click here to enroll your team directly. If you would like to learn more about our enterprise learning licenses, schedule a discovery call or send an email at [\](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#610e0812080f4f0e1304080d0d1821000809134f020e0c) with any of your queries.

### My question is not in the list

Our team is happy to answer any other questions you may have! You can contact our support team or schedule a call if you need help making the best choice for your HR career goals.
